summary: Decent soundboard recording with some tape hiss, but the show receives mixed reactions from listeners.
review: The SBD source provides a generally good‑quality audio track—clearer than many other board recordings—but it is not free of tape hiss. Fans are divided on the performance: several praise the concert as enjoyable and classic ’84 material, while others were underwhelmed or note that a better show followed the next night.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews are split on the musical performance (average rating ~2.7) while the recording quality is viewed as good (~4). Weighted combination yields a modest overall score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Tape hiss is audible and may bother some listeners, but reviewers note it sounds better than other board tapes and consider the upgrade worthwhile.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; opinions on the overall performance are mixed.
